arts.ttl: Heracles' Engels scores from inside own half against Ajax
arts.sum: Watch as Heracles Almelo's Mario Engels scores an incredible goal from beyond the halfway line in their Dutch Eredivisie match against Ajax.

arts.ttl: Man Utd outcast Antony left in no man's land as doubts emerge over Ajax return
arts.sum: Antony has fallen down the pecking order at Manchester United over the past 12 months, and his stock has fallen so much that his former club, Ajax, now have doubts over re-signing him

arts.ttl: Preview: Qarabag FK vs. Ajax - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Qarabag FK and Ajax, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
